message:
learn: add LearnProcess with async queue and mutation application

Implements the core LearnProcess class that manages a signal queue and
applies structured mutations (create_memory, update_agent, create_agent,
create_routing_rule) to the genome. Includes LLM-based reasoning for
improvement decisions via reasonAboutImprovement().

10 tests covering queue management, filtering integration, all four
mutation types, and event emission -- all using real Genome/MetricsStore
instances (no mocks).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
